prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-LUDDRTDPWRCGN-BUN-AMZ Product Type: TOY_FIGURE Brand (from catalog): TychoTyke Existing Title: TychoTyke Dancing Dino Light Up T-Rex Dinosaur Toy with Radio Control - Green Description: Is your child a dinosaur fanatic? Then they need the TychoTyke Dancing Dino T-Rex Predator RC Toy.

This unique interactive toy is designed with education in mind. Children can travel back to the Mesozoic area with their very own T-Rex lookalike. It features the T-Rex's iconic spikes and has a roaring sound that will allow your child to pretend they are playing with the apex predator from millions of years ago.

The toy itself is constructed of high-quality durable plastic that can withstand hours of indoor or outdoor play. It also comes with a wireless remote control that will allow kids to make the dino walk and dance. The remote has 5 functions - forward movement, roar, dance, fast forward and stop.

In addition to this dino's cool moves, it lights up with a press of the fossil footprint button. The combination of lifelike design and fun sounds, lights and movements make this a great gift idea for young kids and dinosaur enthusiasts.

Requires 5 AA batteries (not included), ideal for ages 3 and up. Search Terms: dancing toys light up kids paleontology kits archaeology dinosaur themed presents remote control pretend play indoor t rex models prehistoric educational learning Features: - EDUCATIONAL TOY - Dinosaur T-Rex Predator Toy Teaches Kids About Mesozoic Era | Iconic Rex Spikes, Arms and Feet - INTERACTIVE RC DESIGN - Comes with Fossil Shaped Remote Control with 5 Functions | Dino Can Dance, Move Forward, Fast Forward, Roar and Stop for Ultimate Pretend Experience - HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL - Made of Durable Plastic Ideal for Indoor or Outdoor Play | Requires 5 AA Batteries (Not Included) - CHILD SIZED - Dinosaur is 11" Tall | Ideal Size for Young Kids | Safe for Children Ages 3 and Up - LIGHTS UP - T-Rex's Eyes and Back Light Up During Playtime | Great Gift to Keep Kids' Attention === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
